hero_background.visual_description: Industrial server room with glowing teal and blue subtle neon accents, wide shot, deep depth of field. High-end photography style, representing solid foundational infrastructure without clutter.

m365_icon.visual_description: Clean geometrical representation of a unified digital workspace paradigm. A central nexus with connecting nodes, subtle teal illumination on a dark gray matrix.

azure_icon.visual_description: Abstract active-active cloud architecture diagram. Twin glowing cyan nodes synchronizing data flows over a dark navy background, representing multi-region redundancy.

zero_trust_icon.visual_description: Conceptual microsegmentation shield. Encapsulated network nodes with strict boundary outlines and glowing neon blue locking mechanisms. Highly technical and pristine.
